=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Refactor to Schema (Recursive Structural)" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_externalType.ts ---
// refactor: 5:13-5:19
import type { ExternalUser } from "@/utils/types"
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const Config = Schema.Any;

export type Config = ExternalUser
